## Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Run `agentmesh ...`
2. ...

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include error output if any.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.11.0]
- AgentMesh version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- Claude Code version: [e.g. 1.x.x]

## Additional context
Any other context, logs, or screenshots.
